required.name: filesystem
required.purpose: Read and edit repository files with explicit workspace limits

required.name: git
required.purpose: Inspect diffs, history, branches, and changed files

required.name: fetch
required.purpose: Fetch external documentation as markdown when current docs are required

required.name: browser
required.purpose: Use Microsoft Playwright MCP for deterministic web UI and HTML verification
required.notes: Codex CLI registration: codex mcp add playwright npx "@playwright/mcp@latest"

optional.name: database-readonly
optional.purpose: Inspect schemas and safe sample data without mutation

optional.name: logs-readonly
optional.purpose: Read production errors from observability systems

optional.name: docs-search
optional.purpose: Search internal docs, runbooks, ADRs, and product specs
